reviews.comment:
Muy buena atencion. Las habitaciones renovadas y muy limpias!!. Muy recomendable!!

(Translated by Google)
Very good service. The rooms are renovated and very clean! Highly recommended!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhMm9DRDNnRRAB

reviews.comment:
Lamentablemente estación de servicio donde no fue buena mi experiencia. En plena pandemia, donde todo es "para llevar", no tenían vasos para café para llevar.

La atención fue amena, lo necesario, no pude obtener el servicio que buscaba.

NO suman puntos YPF.

(Translated by Google)
Unfortunately, this gas station was not a good experience for me. In the middle of a pandemic, when everything is "to-go," they didn't have cups for takeaway coffee.

The service was friendly and adequate, but I didn't get the level of service I was looking for.

They don't accept YPF points.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNhbk42U0lBEAE

reviews.comment:
La atención en tiempo es promedio.
El full no era muy moderno y no tenía mucha variedad de productos como la mayoría.
Detrás hay un parque para parar a comer

(Translated by Google)
The service was average. The food wasn't very modern and didn't have a wide variety of products, like most places. There's a park behind it where you can stop for a bite to eat.

reviews.comment:
Muy buen motel para descansar en viaje. Habitaciones renovadas, Smart TV, camas 1er nivel, cochera individual techada, buen precio, desayuno incluido, cordial atención de Cesar y las chicas

(Translated by Google)
A very good motel for resting while traveling. Renovated rooms, Smart TV, first-class beds, covered private parking, good price, breakfast included, friendly service from Cesar and the staff
